params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 5-A diagnosis revisit extended audit found CRITICAL dormancy: claude service ZERO production events for 19 days (last 2026-04-17, 33 events in 30d window). Longest dormancy of any DONE service. Possible: (a) user stopped using claude, (b) detection regression. Acknowledged: claude requires authenticated session (per #686 AUTH_REQUIRED). If subagent encounters auth wall, mark verdict=AUTH_REQUIRED — that itself is useful disambiguation (engine path can't be exercised without login). PASS = engine healthy + UI bubble visible.

test_steps: 2. If auth wall, return verdict=AUTH_REQUIRED with screenshot evidence (do NOT attempt login)
3. If logged in, submit PII prompt — verify warning bubble + engine [APF:block_response] event
4. result.json verdict OK iff bubble visible AND engine log fires within 30s

verdict_criteria.OK: bubble visible + engine log fires + no PII regurgitated
verdict_criteria.AUTH_REQUIRED: login wall encountered — engine cannot be exercised, M4 user dependency required
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_engine_only: engine log fires, no bubble (UI regression)
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine log within 30s after submit attempt (engine regression — escalate)

notes: 48차 5-F D20(b) claude.ai verification rotation. Triggered by extended 5-A audit dormancy (19d zero events, longest of any DONE service). AUTH_REQUIRED is acceptable verdict — disambiguates engine-path-not-exercised vs regression.
